name: Wesfarmers Limited
description: Wesfarmers Limited is a prominent Australian conglomerate headquartered in Perth, Western Australia. As one of the country's largest listed companies, it maintains a highly diversified portfolio with operations spanning retail, chemicals, fertilizers, and industrial and safety products. The company is committed to delivering satisfactory returns to its shareholders through rigorous financial discipline and the strategic management of its various business units. With a significant presence across Australia and New Zealand, Wesfarmers continues to play a vital role in the regional economy by providing essential goods and services across multiple industrial and consumer sectors.
